title: Crunchy Cornmeal Bites
description: A Chinese-inspired snack recipe made with cornmeal, crisps, and pickles, perfect for a quick bite. The crunch from the crisps and cornmeal pairs well with the sourness of the pickles.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, crushed crisps, and finely chopped pickles.
Add the with to the bowl and stir until the mixture is well combined.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Place the balls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the balls are lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
